--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

-----Original Message-----
From: Summer Claire Brennan [mailto:scb268@nyu.edu]
Sent: Monday, September 11, 2006 9:23 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Jeffrey - I'm back from El Salvador

Hello,

I'm so sorry that we were not able to connect about
the painting before
I went away to do my volunteer work in Central
America. I am finally
back and unpacked though. It was an amazing
experience, although living
in the village like that with no running water was
quite an adventure! I
lost 10 pounds! I'll call it the "impoverished
village" diet. Anyways I
would love for Jeffrey to FINALLY get this painting
and I wanted to
propose some options. If he wanted to send someone
to pick it up, I will
be around every evening this week after 7:30, or
thursday or friday
morning before 1pm. Or, I can also drop it off at
the office in the
morning on Wednesday. You all also have a baked good
coming your way
soon.

Anyways I hope this finds Jeffrey and you well.
Speak to you soon,

Summer
